summary: Iteration 168: All 5 feature changes tested and verified. All 15 backend tests PASSED. UI tests confirmed all features working correctly.

features_tested: Login page /login has NO Google button or 'or' divider - PASS
Register page /register has NO Google button or 'or' divider - PASS
Register page still captures ?ref= referral code parameter - PASS (referral code input visible)
Profile page Share button navigates to /profile (not /referrals) - PASS (verified in code: navigate('/profile'))
/google page shows 'Staff Access Only' when not logged in - PASS (screenshot verified)
/google page shows 'Access Denied' for non-staff logged-in users - PASS (screenshot verified)
GET /api/auth/staff-check returns is_staff:false for regular users - PASS
POST /api/auth/resend-verification works for authenticated users - PASS
Existing user login works normally (grandfathered - no email_verified field) - PASS
/verify-email page renders correctly - PASS (shows error for missing token)
AnalyticsDashboard has NO 'Referral Performance' section - PASS
MemberPageDashboard has NO 'Referral Program' section - PASS (verified with grep)
Subscription pages and Stripe payment buttons still work - PASS
Wallet page loads correctly with all sections - PASS

context_for_next_testing_agent: All 5 feature changes verified: 1) Google buttons removed from login/register, 2) Profile Share navigates to /profile, 3) Referral sections removed from analytics dashboards, 4) /google page is staff-only with proper access control, 5) Email verification endpoints working. Test user: tester@blendlink.net is an existing user (grandfathered) without email_verified field blocking login.
